14. The annual net primary productivity of the
whole biosphere is approximately
A) 190 million tons B) 170 million tons
C) 170 billion tons D) None of these
Page-243, Easy
14.3 Decomposition
15. Which one of the following is called as
“farmer’s friend”?
A) Cow B) Bacteria
C) Earthworm D) Crops
Page-243, Easy
16. Who breaks down complex organic matter
into inorganic substances like CO», water
etc.
A) Crop roots B) Decomposers
C) Grazing Cattle D) None of these
Page-243, Easy
17. The process of breaks down complex
organic matter into inorganic substances
is called as
A) Fragmentation B) Humification
C) Decomposition D) Leaching
Page-243, Easy
18. Detritus is/are
A) Dead plant B) Dead animals
C) Fecal matter D) All of these
Page-243, Easy
19. The correct way of decomposition
A) Fragmentation — leaching —»
humification — catabolism —
mineralization
B) Fragmentation — leaching — catabolism
— humification —» mineralization
C) Fragmentation — catabolism — leaching
— mineralization — humification
D) Fragmentation — mineralization —
catabolism — leaching » humification
Page-243-244, Medium
20. break down detritus into
smaller particles
A) Earthworm
